sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI ITRAs 153 to 161 of 2012 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of main case. 08.10.2025 Mr. Sajjad Ali Solangi, advocate for the applicant. Mr. Abdul Rahim Lakhani, advocate and Mr. Atta M. Solangi, advocate for the respondent. These reference applications are pending since 2012 without any progress. Perusal of the order sheet demonstrates that the applicant has remained unrepresented at least since 2021. Even today Mr. Sajjad Ali Solangi, advocate is present and merely seeks time. It appears that the applicant is not interested in proceeding with these matters, therefore, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, these reference applications are dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Office is instructed to place copy hereof in the connected files. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
